subject: [PATCH 10/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle single object charge migration in migrate_zspage

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's approach to node migrations and suggested an alternative method using existing functions.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Agreed with David's concerns and suggested additional checks to ensure accurate node migrations.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses migration of zsmalloc compressed objects, handling single object charge migration in migrate_zspage. It calculates the portion of each object on each page and performs up to four uncharge-charges to simplify node migrations.
